themes.label: Truth
themes.summary: This chapter brings truth, faithfulness, revelation, or the trustworthiness of God into focus. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "God commands: 'appoint thou the Levites over the tabernacle of testimony, and over all the ve...". Word-study detail reinforces "הָֽעֵדֻ֜ת: of testimony - testimony".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "לִרְאוּבֵ֕ן: with you of the tribe of Reuben - reuben, a son of jacob".

themes.label: Judgment
themes.summary: This chapter addresses wrath, judgment, condemnation, justice, or divine reckoning. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The Levites were to camp around the tabernacle 'that there be no wrath upon the congregation...". Cross references echo "Judgment".

themes.label: Righteousness
themes.summary: This chapter presses into righteousness, justice, uprightness, or holy living before God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.
